title: Mobile Push Notifications - Past Due
excerpt: Built in option for mobile push notifications when a specific item is due day of or past due. I think that would be really helpful when using multiple boards and primarily using the mobile app.  I’m aware that this can b…

posts.author: AkaNeko13 (Felicia )
posts.cookedHtml: Built in option for mobile push notifications when a specific item is due day of or past due. I think that would be really helpful when using multiple boards and primarily using the mobile app. I’m aware that this can be done through an automation, but being able to set it up right through the mobile app would vastly improve the mobile experience.

posts.author: dtsno2020 (Desi's Tropical Sno Shack)
posts.cookedHtml: I would also like this, especially for the ‘My Work’ page. I need it to yell at me when dates are coming close on all boards.
